name: pendpost
description: pendpost is a free, open-source (MIT), local-first social media planner where an AI agent drafts and schedules posts across Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, YouTube, and X behind a human approval gate you control.
author: Nomadik GmbH

scripts.build: cd app && npm install && npm run build
scripts.check: node --check server.mjs && for f in lib/*.mjs lib/drivers/*.mjs scripts/*.mjs bin/*.mjs test/*.mjs; do node --check "$f" || exit 1; done && node scripts/check-encoding.mjs && node test/parity-check.mjs && for t in test/*.test.mjs; do node "$t" || exit 1; done
